data.explanation: Mhie, ang vague naman nito. 'Hello po' lang? Walang context, walang chika. Parang naghahanap lang ng kausap, not necessarily fake, pero suspicious pa rin.

data.maritesMode: Mhie, ang vague naman nito. 'Hello po' lang? Walang context, walang chika. Parang naghahanap lang ng kausap, not necessarily fake, pero suspicious pa rin.

resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, mukhang opinion lang yan kasi walang specific claim na pwedeng i-fact-check or pagbasehan ng evidence.

points.issue: Walang specific info na binibigay, so paano natin malalaman kung totoo o hindi?
points.correction: Dapat may specific detail para ma-verify, like sino nagsabi, kailan nangyari, or saan nangyari.

points.issue: Mukhang walang source or basis yung statement.
points.correction: Dapat may pinanggalingan yung info, like news article, research, or expert testimony, para mas credible.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, sis, hanapin mo yung mga claims na may konkretong detalye at pwedeng i-verify bago mo i-share.
